name: BM Acquisition Corp.
summary: PART I In this Annual Report on Form 10-K (the Form 10-K), references to the Company and to we, us, and our refer to BM Acquisition Corp. Overview We are a blank check company incorporated on May 9, 2025 as a Cayman Islands exempted company whose business purpose is to effect a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which we refer to as our initial business combination.
